release_gates.evidence: testDebugUnitTest passed; 128 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped
lintDebug passed; lint-results-debug.xml has 0 issue elements
app/build.gradle.kts defaults missing Supabase config to empty strings
Only index migrations found; no table/RLS/storage policy migrations
Function source checks only Authorization bearer prefix; no committed verify_jwt config
androidTest files exist but were not run locally and are not in CI

issues.title: Release build produces an unsigned APK
issues.intent: Configure the release build with minification and resource shrinking.
issues.actual_behavior: No release signing config is defined; assembleRelease produced app-release-unsigned.apk.
issues.risk: The produced release artifact cannot be shipped to Play or internal testers as a signed release artifact.
issues.fix: Add release signing/AAB workflow using CI secrets or Play App Signing, and document the key path.
issues.verification: Run :app:bundleRelease or :app:assembleRelease and verify the output is signed with apksigner or accepted by Play Console.
issues.regression_test: Add CI release packaging step that fails if the artifact is unsigned or missing.

issues.title: Release backend config silently defaults to empty strings
issues.intent: Inject Supabase URL and anon key into BuildConfig.
issues.actual_behavior: If local.properties is absent, release builds compile with blank Supabase config; CI does not create local.properties.
issues.risk: Clean CI/release builds can produce an app that fails Supabase initialization at startup or cannot authenticate.
issues.fix: Read Gradle properties/environment variables and fail release builds when required values are blank or placeholders.
issues.verification: Delete local.properties and confirm assembleRelease fails with a clear error; supply env/Gradle props and confirm assembleRelease passes.
issues.regression_test: Add build logic test or CI job that validates release config injection.

issues.title: Widget uses exact alarm permission for a 15-second refresh loop
issues.intent: Keep the streak widget visually fresh.
issues.actual_behavior: The app declares SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM and schedules repeated 15-second widget refreshes that can fetch remote profile data.
issues.risk: Play policy rejection, battery drain, and background execution/user-trust risk.
issues.fix: Remove exact alarm permission and replace the 15-second loop with AppWidget update cadence, WorkManager, or profile-change driven cached updates.
issues.verification: Install on Android 14/15 and confirm no exact-alarm permission prompt and no 15-second wakeups in dumpsys alarm.
issues.regression_test: Update StreakWidgetAlarmSchedulerTest to assert non-exact policy-compliant scheduling.

issues.title: Edge Function JWT validation is not proven by repository evidence
issues.intent: Require authenticated callers before forwarding to paid Gemini and Places APIs.
issues.actual_behavior: Function source only checks bearer-prefix shape; no committed config or code verifies the JWT is valid.
issues.risk: If Supabase function JWT verification is disabled or misconfigured, arbitrary bearer strings can access paid API proxies.
issues.fix: Commit Supabase function config with verify_jwt enabled for both functions or validate the token server-side before forwarding.
issues.verification: Deploy to staging and confirm Authorization: Bearer garbage returns 401 for both proxy functions.
issues.regression_test: Add function tests for missing, malformed, expired, and valid JWTs.

issues.title: Supabase schema, RLS, and storage policy migrations are missing
issues.snippet: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_profiles_friend_code
issues.intent: Provide backend migrations required by the app.
issues.actual_behavior: Only indexes are committed; no table creation, RLS policy, or storage bucket policy migrations are present.
issues.risk: Profile, friendship, precise location, and avatar access control cannot be proven safe from repo evidence.
issues.fix: Add full schema/RLS/storage migrations and policy tests for profiles, friendships, and avatars.
issues.verification: Run supabase db reset from the repo and pass policy tests proving users can only access allowed rows/objects.
issues.regression_test: Add backend tests for own profile update, friend read scope, non-friend denial, and avatar path ownership.

issues.title: Release-reachable logs expose place and query data
issues.intent: Debug place-verification failures.
issues.actual_behavior: Log calls outside BuildConfig.DEBUG include target place names, candidate place names, city/query text, and validation reasons.
issues.risk: Release logcat can expose user location intent/search/place data.
issues.fix: Gate all place/query logs behind debug-only helpers and redact names in release logs.
issues.verification: Run a release build through failed place lookup and confirm logcat contains no place, city, or query names.
issues.regression_test: Add static test or lint check blocking raw Log calls in privacy-sensitive API classes.

issues.title: Mission photo verification decodes full-size camera images
issues.intent: Read the captured mission photo for Gemini vision verification.
issues.actual_behavior: The full camera image is decoded into memory without bounds/downsampling.
issues.risk: Large images can cause OOM on a common mission verification path.
issues.fix: Decode bounds first and downsample to a bounded max dimension before compression.
issues.verification: Verify mission photo flow with 12MP/48MP images on low-memory emulator/device.
issues.regression_test: Add a test for large-image decode helper output dimensions and memory cap.

issues.title: Precise friend-location sharing lacks explicit opt-in and opt-out evidence
issues.intent: Keep user location fresh for friend markers.
issues.actual_behavior: Map use can write precise lat/lng to the remote profile without an explicit sharing toggle in the repo.
issues.risk: Privacy/data-safety risk for user location sharing.
issues.fix: Add location-sharing disclosure, opt-out, retention behavior, and optional coarse sharing.
issues.verification: Disable sharing and confirm last_lat/last_lng are not written or shown to friends.
issues.regression_test: Add MapViewModel test that opt-out prevents repository.updateProfile location writes.

issues.title: Google OAuth callback does not persist remember-me state
issues.intent: Let users sign in with Google and enter the main app.
issues.actual_behavior: Email login writes remember-me, but Google sign-in starts OAuth and AuthActivity navigates to main without setting remember-me.
issues.risk: Google users can be routed to AuthActivity and signed out on next launch when remember-me is false.
issues.fix: Persist the user's session preference before OAuth and apply it on callback, or treat successful OAuth as remembered by design.
issues.verification: Sign in with Google, force-stop/relaunch, and confirm the user remains in the intended auth state.
issues.regression_test: Add AuthRouting/Auth callback test covering OAuth remember-me behavior.

issues.title: CI does not run release build or inject release config
issues.intent: Run automated checks for pushes and pull requests.
issues.actual_behavior: CI runs unit tests and debug lint only; no release build, config injection, signing, artifact upload, or androidTest gate.
issues.risk: Main can stay green while release packaging is broken.
issues.fix: Add release config creation from secrets, bundle/assemble release, artifact upload, and instrumented smoke tests.
issues.verification: CI fails when release config is missing and passes when secrets are supplied.
issues.regression_test: Protect main on the enhanced CI workflow.

issues.title: Paid API proxy functions have no per-user rate limit
issues.intent: Proxy Places/Gemini calls so mobile clients do not hold provider API keys.
issues.actual_behavior: After minimal request validation, functions forward to paid APIs without per-user quota or rate limiting.
issues.risk: Authenticated abuse can cause cost spikes and API exhaustion.
issues.fix: Add per-user rate/burst limits using Deno KV, Supabase table/RPC, or provider-side quotas keyed by user.
issues.verification: Repeated requests over the threshold return 429 and do not call upstream provider.
issues.regression_test: Function test for quota exceeded path.

issues.title: Friendships lack unordered uniqueness and self-edge constraints
issues.intent: Create accepted friendship rows by friend code.
issues.actual_behavior: The app inserts directional rows and migrations only add lookup indexes.
issues.risk: Reverse duplicates and race duplicates can cause inconsistent social state.
issues.fix: Add a DB constraint/index on least/greatest user ids plus user_id <> friend_id.
issues.verification: Insert A->B then B->A and confirm the second insert fails with a mapped already-friends result.
issues.regression_test: Repository/backend test for duplicate/reverse friendship.

issues.title: HTTPS invite App Links are not verified
issues.intent: Open wanderly.app invite links directly in the app.
issues.actual_behavior: HTTPS filters lack android:autoVerify and no assetlinks.json evidence is committed.
issues.risk: Invite links may open a browser or chooser instead of the app.
issues.fix: Add autoVerify and deploy a valid assetlinks.json for wanderly.app.
issues.verification: adb shell pm get-app-links com.novahorizon.wanderly reports verified host.
issues.regression_test: Add manual release checklist item for App Links verification.

issues.title: Runtime logs and screenshots are tracked
issues.snippet: SupabaseClient: Initializing Supabase with URL: https://aimpa***
issues.intent: Keep debugging evidence from prior work.
issues.actual_behavior: Tracked logcat text and screenshots remain in source control.
issues.risk: Logs and screenshots can leak runtime data and bloat release branches.
issues.fix: Remove tracked runtime logs/screenshots and expand .gitignore for logcat txt and root screenshots.
issues.verification: git ls-files logs *.png docs/previews/*.png contains only intentional reviewed assets.
issues.regression_test: Add hygiene check blocking tracked log captures.

issues.title: Instrumented tests are not run by CI
issues.intent: Validate the app in automation.
issues.actual_behavior: CI runs unit tests/lint only; androidTest classes are present but not executed.
issues.risk: Auth, permission, camera, and mission UI regressions can pass CI.
issues.fix: Run a managed-device androidTest smoke suite or Firebase Test Lab in CI.
issues.verification: CI publishes androidTest results for login, mission, and permission flows.
issues.regression_test: Protect main on the androidTest smoke job.

issues.title: ProfileFragment is a god fragment
issues.intent: Render and operate the profile screen.
issues.actual_behavior: The 480 LOC Fragment owns avatar picking/cropping, dialogs, admin entry, logout, badges, class selection, and sharing UI.
issues.risk: High regression risk when fixing profile/avatar/release issues.
issues.fix: Split focused controllers/renderers and keep ViewModel as state owner.
issues.verification: Profile flows pass UI tests after split.
issues.regression_test: Add tests for avatar, username edit, share code, class dialog, and logout.

issues.title: No production crash reporting is configured
issues.intent: Declare app dependencies.
issues.actual_behavior: No Crashlytics, Sentry, or equivalent crash reporting dependency/config was found.
issues.risk: Production crashes cannot be triaged from real user devices.
issues.fix: Add crash reporting with privacy-safe keys and release mapping upload.
issues.verification: Trigger a test crash/non-fatal in internal build and verify deobfuscated dashboard event.
issues.regression_test: CI uploads mapping files for release builds.

issues.title: Profile share button touch target is below 48dp
issues.intent: Show a compact share friend-code button.
issues.actual_behavior: The touch target is 40dp x 40dp.
issues.risk: Accessibility/tap accuracy issue.
issues.fix: Increase the touch target to at least 48dp and preserve icon padding.
issues.verification: Run Accessibility Scanner on the profile screen.
issues.regression_test: Layout assertion or screenshot accessibility check for touch target.

issues.title: Invalid legacy mission coordinates migrate to 0.0
issues.intent: Migrate legacy string coordinates to typed float preferences.
issues.actual_behavior: Invalid coordinate strings become 0.0 and are saved.
issues.risk: Corrupted mission data can point to latitude/longitude 0,0.
issues.fix: Return null and remove invalid legacy keys instead of persisting 0.0.
issues.verification: Invalid legacy lat/lng returns no mission target.
issues.regression_test: Unit test for invalid legacy coordinate migration.

issues.title: Onboarding ViewPager2 callback is not unregistered
issues.intent: Update onboarding actions when the page changes.
issues.actual_behavior: Anonymous callback is registered and never unregistered in onDestroyView.
issues.risk: Potential retained view callback or lifecycle edge-case crash.
issues.fix: Store the callback in a field and unregister in onDestroyView.
issues.verification: Navigate/rotate onboarding repeatedly without leaks or callback after destroy.
issues.regression_test: Lifecycle test for onboarding teardown.

issues.title: Nonessential IDE metadata is tracked
issues.intent: Share Android Studio project metadata.
issues.actual_behavior: Multiple .idea XML files are tracked.
issues.risk: Cross-machine churn and noisy release diffs.
issues.fix: Untrack nonessential .idea files and keep only shared code style if desired.
issues.verification: Fresh Android Studio open does not dirty tracked IDE files.
issues.regression_test: Hygiene check for forbidden IDE files.

issues.title: Local unit, lint, and release build tasks pass
issues.intent: Configure local test behavior.
issues.actual_behavior: testDebugUnitTest, lintDebug, and assembleRelease exited 0 during audit.
issues.risk: Useful evidence only; release artifact remains unsigned.
issues.fix: Keep these gates and add release-grade CI gates.
issues.verification: Re-run the same Gradle commands.
issues.regression_test: CI runs these commands on every PR.

issues.title: Room is not used
issues.intent: Declare dependencies.
issues.actual_behavior: No Room dependency, @Database, @Dao, or @Entity evidence was found.
issues.risk: Local relational migration audit is not applicable.
issues.fix: N/A - no Room/local SQL database is used.
issues.verification: Search for Room annotations/dependencies remains empty.
issues.regression_test: N/A unless Room is added.

issues.title: Dependency latest versions were not verified
issues.intent: Pin dependency versions.
issues.actual_behavior: The audit did not verify latest stable versions or vulnerability database status.
issues.risk: No claim is made that dependencies are current or vulnerability-free.
issues.fix: Add a dependency update/vulnerability scanning tool and review direct dependencies.
issues.verification: Scanner report is committed or uploaded in CI.
issues.regression_test: CI fails on known critical direct dependency vulnerabilities.
